beats.what: A person's fingers are positioned over the laptop keyboard, preparing to type.
The person begins typing on the laptop keyboard, with fingers moving across the keys.
The person continues typing, with fingers actively pressing various keys on the keyboard.
The person's fingers continue to move rhythmically across the keyboard as they type.

formal.text: Fingers hover above the laptop keyboard.
The subject continues the typing sequence.

sarcastic.text: Preparing for a monumental literary achievement.
Look at those keys fly. Pure cinematic magic.

humorous_tech.text: Preparing to push to production on a Friday afternoon.
Typing code that definitely works on my local machine.
Adding more technical debt with every single keystroke.
Refactoring the same function for the fifth time today.

humorous_non_tech.text: Or at least a very long grocery list.
The typing intensity is truly unmatched.
